goal: Prepare the remaining M6 real-adapter CUDA path for final-program completion by adding a digest-pinned CUDA base image resolver and wiring the generated CUDA training/Docker handoff shells to use it when MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST is unset. The gate must not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO; release readiness remains NOT_GO until a real trained adapter and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exist.
head: 52b0187
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, specs, or release acceptance policy
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a focused CUDA base image resolver script, wire generated handoff shells to use it only when the digest env var is unset, update focused tests, regenerate review handoff artifacts, rerun readiness, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: Resolver emits a digest-pinned MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST env file only for locally inspectable CUDA-marked images with RepoDigests
Resolver rejects non-CUDA images and local images that lack RepoDigests
Generated CUDA training handoff attempts the resolver only when MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST is unset, then sources the env file before preflight
Generated Docker image handoff has the same guarded resolver behavior before docker build
Current local resolver artifact remains NOT_READY_CUDA_BASE_IMAGE because the current host lacks a local digest-pinned CUDA/PyTorch base image
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, or create model weights/adapters.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped resolver/handoff gate for the remaining digest-pinned CUDA base image setup friction before real adapter training and Docker export.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed the Dockerfile requires a digest-pinned base image and the project CUDA lane is pinned to torch 2.4.1+cu121, making pytorch/pytorch:2.4.1-cuda12.1-cudnn9-runtime the conservative default CUDA/Python base image candidate.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/resolve_cuda_base_image.py, focused resolver tests, and conditional resolver steps in the generated CUDA training and Docker image handoff shells.
phase_notes.check: Verified resolver unit behavior, regenerated CUDA training and Docker image handoff artifacts, recorded the current host as NOT_READY_CUDA_BASE_IMAGE because the default PyTorch CUDA runtime image is not local, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a CUDA base image resolver/handoff gate. It removes manual digest-env setup friction for the CUDA host path without pulling images, running training, or claiming M6-RC/v0 GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Focused CUDA base image resolver, generated handoff shell integration, focused tests, regenerated review artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
